2026-05-28VACPension ActRegulations Amending Schedule IV to the Pension ActRegulations Amending Schedule IV to the Pension Act in order to add January 1, 2026, and the basic pension amount of $ 3,513.48 for that date, to Schedule IV of the Pension Act.Registration: SOR/2026-0099 Publication Date: 2026-06-17
subject: Regulations Amending Schedule IV to the Pension Act
precis: Regulations Amending Schedule IV to the Pension Act in order to add January 1, 2026, and the basic pension amount of $ 3,513.48 for that date, to Schedule IV of the Pension Act.
